room.name: Small Shrine To The Diggle God Of Mediocrity

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The flames of these candles writhe tentacularly in the damp air.

customengraving.name: Floor Candles
customengraving.description: The flames of these candles struggle against the dampness.

customblocker.name: Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames burn with rage.

customblocker.name: Sconce
customblocker.description: The flames burn with rage.

customblocker.name: Prison Bars
customblocker.description: Unlike the others, these bars look like they've been jammed open.

customblocker.name: Scrawl
customblocker.description: A day count, up to 514.

customblocker.name: Scrawl
customblocker.description: A poorly played game of tic-tac-toe.

customblocker.name: Scrawl
customblocker.description: The entire script for a sci-fi series entitled Farstation 9.

customblocker.name: Scrawl
customblocker.description: The entire script for a sci-fi series entitled Farstation 9.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Was this a prisoner...or a meal?

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: This pile of bones looks impossibly ancient.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Charred and rotten, these bones have seen better days.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Still more bones. It seems most sentences in Dredmor Penitentiary are for life.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: These look a little too fresh for your liking.

customengraving.name: Blood Splatter
customengraving.description: A bloody smear is streaked across this cell. Was someone dragged?

customblocker.name: Prison Bars
customblocker.description: Rusty and dented, these prison bars appear at least moderately effective.

customblocker.name: Prison Bars
customblocker.description: Rusty and dented, these prison bars appear at least moderately effective.

customblocker.name: Iron Maiden
customblocker.description: Decidedly less awesome than the band of the same name.

customblocker.name: The Rack
customblocker.description: I don't know about you, but I prefer my racks on lamb and women.

customblocker.name: Toolbench
customblocker.description: There are some chilling implications here, but you'd probably best not investigate them for fear of hyperborean feedback.

customblocker.name: Hero's Tomb
customblocker.description: Houses the last poor sucker who came through here.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: These bones appear to be gnawed upon. You don't really want to think about what was doing the gnawing: it's probably still nearby.

customblocker.name: Hero's Tomb
customblocker.description: A grim tribute to Dredmor's legacy.

customblocker.name: Hero's Tomb
customblocker.description: A grim tribute to Dredmor's legacy.

customblocker.name: Hero's Tomb
customblocker.description: A grim tribute to Dredmor's legacy.

customblocker.name: Hero's Tomb

customengraving.description: It's a cute little nest.

customblocker.name: Frozen Fountain
customblocker.description: Looks like it's frozen over.

customblocker.name: Frozen Fountain

room.name: Crypt Filler Leveled Horde Room B
Crypt Filler Leveled Horde Room C
Crypt Filler Shop North Door Room
Crypt Filler Shop South Door Room

customblocker.name: Trashcan
customblocker.description: A wastebin. Trashcan. Thing you put detritus in. It is empty.

customblocker.name: Incinerator
customblocker.description: Probably the reason the trashcan is empty.

customblocker.name: Bookshelf
customblocker.description: Full of junk.

customblocker.name: Bookshelf
customblocker.description: Full of musty, rotting, old tomes.

customblocker.name: Bookshelf
customblocker.description: Full of something called 'Lichloved Monthly'. Gross.

customblocker.name: Smelter
customblocker.description: Used. Harshly and not for its intended purpose, it seems. You can spot bones inside. Ew.

customblocker.name: Smelter
customblocker.description: Used. Harshly and not for its intended purpose, it seems. You can spot bones inside. Ew.

customblocker.name: Workbench
customblocker.description: Chemicals abound! The arsenic bottle is empty.

customblocker.name: Toolbench
customblocker.description: It's a toolbench. What more do you want?

customblocker.name: Toolbench
customblocker.description: It's a toolbench. What more do you want?

customblocker.description: You've been robbed!

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: These ancient bones have seen better days.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Comparatively speaking, these are fresh.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: These bones look to be dwarf-sized.

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Elf bones, you think. Do elves even have bones?

customengraving.name: Bones
customengraving.description: Something has been gnawing on these, and whatever it is, it isn't small.

customengraving.name: Blood Splatter
customengraving.description: Something got killed all over the room.

customblocker.description: Rusty and dented, these prison bars appear at least moderately effective.

customblocker.description: I don't know about you, but I prefer my racks on lamb and women.

customblocker.name: Toolbench
customblocker.description: There are some chilling implications here, but you'd probably best not investigate them for fear of hyperborean feedback.

customblocker.name: Fistbeard Beardfist, Master of Beardfistery
customblocker.description: This statue proclaims itself to be a representation of Fistbeard Beardfist, the greatest dwarven fighter to ever live.

customengraving.description: These bones appear to be gnawed upon. You don't really want to think about what was doing the gnawing: it's probably still nearby.
